title: Fix SQLiteBackend empty path validation and tree tool name
description: Two concrete failures from test-coverage.json: (1) SQLiteBackend.norm('') returns '/' instead of throwing — add empty path guard to SQLiteBackend matching other backends; (2) tree tool is named 'tree' in source but DBB spec requires 'file_tree' — rename the tool definition. These are the only known failing test and a spec mismatch.
